label: Secondary corpus (BIS), table/chart dominant
query: What does the BIS say about non-bank financial intermediation risks in 2024?
source: Captured from Streamlit UI (docs/demo_assets/screenshots/query_2_answer.png). Supersedes the earlier scripts/capture_demo.py run which returned 'I cannot answer' — top_k differs (app uses 8, script used 6) so the annual-report p.17 chunk was in-context for the UI call but not for the script call.

retrieved.note: Primary cited source in the UI; rendered first in the UI 'sources' panel.

answer.answer: The BIS emphasizes that the current macroprudential framework, developed after the Great Financial Crisis, needs to be strengthened to fully address risks in the non-bank financial intermediation sector. This requires clear policy mandates ...

citations.snippet: Primary citation: the BIS Annual Report page on strengthening the post-GFC macroprudential framework for NBFI risks.

capture_notes: Answer text is truncated at the ellipsis because the UI capture did not include the full response text. If the full answer is needed for the video, re-run the query in the app (cache will serve it for free) and copy the complete paragraph.
